narrative_beat: Wide de tres pergaminhos pendurados em varais de ouro com icones diferentes: revista, pomba de arrebatamento, cavalo vermelho

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: three large aged parchment scrolls hanging side by side from ornate golden rods suspended by golden chains, each scroll bearing a different ink illustration: the left scroll shows an open magazine with flames, the center scroll shows a white dove ascending through golden clouds, the right scroll shows a crimson warhorse rearing with a rider holding a sword
subject.focal_point: the center parchment with the ascending dove
subject.secondary: golden chains and rods catching candlelight, faint smoke rising between scrolls
props: ink illustrations of magazine, dove, warhorse

environment.location: a dark cathedral nave with stone pillars flanking the scrolls
environment.time_of_day: candlelit interior, warm glow from below
environment.atmosphere: prophetic roadmap revealed, the trilogy announced

composition.foreground: three hanging scrolls in rich ochre and crimson tones evenly spaced
composition.midground: golden chains and rods against darkness
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white stone pillars and vaulted ceiling

lighting.key_light: warm amber uplighting from below illuminating the three scrolls
lighting.fill_light: faint gold candlelight from sconces on pillars
lighting.rim_light: gold edge on chains and rod connections
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged shadows behind each scroll

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, parchment fiber texture visible, floating orange embers between scrolls

mood.emotion: trilogy revealed, prophetic roadmap laid out

symbolism.primary: three videos, three prophecies, three stages of revelation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus across full depth of field

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
